But rock brains are quite common these days, as you can see by what the "scholars" above did when faced with the verse.]{.class_3527}

Observe that not even "SALVATION" in the New Testament (2 Cor. 1:6) is always a reference to being saved from hell. Philippians 1:19 is certainly not Paul hoping that someone will do something for him that will help him to go to heaven, and Jude was not talking about the new birth when he spoke of God saving the people out of Egypt (Jude 5).

However, once the stupid, conservative Evangelicals and Fundamentalists took the Roman bait, they had to do something to make it "make sense." They did what they always do--- THEY BUTCHERED THE PURE WORDS OF GOD (Psa. 12:6--7) AND REARRANGED THEIR OWN WORDS TO BRING YOU DOWN TO THEIR LEVEL OF IGNORANCE. The operation is absolutely standard and is carried on fifty times a day in every major Christian college in America.

[Note how the grossly corrupt ]{.class_3527}[NASV ]{.class_3526}[of Bob Jones University forces the reader to accept "women, collectively" as the]{.class_3527}[ "they"]{.class_3528}[ of verse 15, then throws out the ]{.class_3527}["saved,"]{.class_3528}[ replaces it with "preserved," but then cannot tell you "for love nor money" to what the word "PRESERVED" is a reference. "Preserved?" Why, if it is talking about "being kept safe" (see above), it would mean that UNSAVED WOMEN ARE KEPT SAFE AND PRESERVED. For if you make the]{.class_3527}[ "they"]{.class_3528}[ women collectively, you have done the worst thing you could do with the entire New Testament: you have stated that all unsaved women who have children are safe, kept safe, saved, "preserved," or whatever. They certainly are not. The reference is to a saved woman married to a saved man, to whom she is to be in subjection (vss. 10--15). All of the new "readable translations" were simply perversions of the truth of God.]{.class_3527}

Never worry about the Monarch of the Books. It never bats less than 1,000-plus. There are numerous sermons in the passage.

[A. ]{.class_3527}[PRAYER IS IMPORTANT BECAUSE:]{.class_3526}

[1. ]{.class_3527}["The powers that be"]{.class_3528}[ are controlled by the One Who answers prayer (vs. 2).]{.class_3527}

2. Temporal and local peace can be obtained only in this way (vs. 2).

3. Every man needs something, even those who don't know their need (vs. 1).

4. This need can only be met by the One Who deserves thanksgiving (vs. 1).

[B. ]{.class_3527}[GOD'S WILL FOR MANKIND:]{.class_3526}

[1. That they come to a ]{.class_3527}["knowledge of the truth."]{.class_3528}

2. That they accept His way of settling the sin question (vs. 6).

3. That they accept His Son as the Way to Him (vs. 5).

4. That they be saved from death and hell (vs. 4).

[C. ]{.class_3527}[THE THREE CALLINGS OF PAUL:]{.class_3526}

1. A preacher---every child of God is called to witness to the Gospel news (Acts 1).

2. An apostle---as only twelve were called in Christ's lifetime.

3. A teacher---as pastors are called in the body of Christ (Eph. 4).

The preacher is to announce the death, burial, and resurrection of Christ (1 Cor. 15:3--4).

[The apostle is to demonstrate the powers and signs given for Israel to convince the Gentiles that ]{.class_3527}["SALVATION IS OF THE JEWS"]{.class_3528}[ (John 4:22).]{.class_3527}

The teacher is to root, ground, establish, and build up converts in the faith.

[D. ]{.class_3527}[THE TEMPTATIONS OF THE "WEAKER]{.class_3526}[ ]{.class_3527}[SEX"]{.class_3526}[ (vs. 11).]{.class_3527}

1. To attract attention by dress (vs. 9).

2. To refuse to make a profession that will involve conduct.

3. To "talk back" and argue with their husbands.

4. To complain and be depressed when bearing children.

5. To be deceived by the devil.

[E. ]{.class_3527}[THE MIDDLE MAN]{.class_3526}

1. A mediator must be thoroughly familiar with both sides of the question.

2. A mediator must be chosen by both sides.

3. Both sides must leave the mediation completely in His hands.

4. Both sides must accept His work and His decision. (Mark how this eliminates Mary, Buddha, the Pope, Mohammed, Joseph, or any other substitute from having any claim to the office of MEDIATOR.)

CHAPTER THREE

3:1 This is a true saying, If a man desire the office of a bishop, he desireth a good work.

2 A bishop then must be blameless, the husband of one wife, vigilant, sober, of good behaviour, given to hospitality, apt to teach;

3 Not given to wine, no striker, not greedy of filthy lucre; but patient, not a brawler, not covetous;

4 One that ruleth well his own house, having his children in subjection with all gravity;

5 (For if a man know not how to rule his own house, how shall he take care of the church of God?)

6 Not a novice, lest being lifted up with pride he fall into the condemnation of the devil.

7 Moreover he must have a good report of them which are without; lest he fall into reproach and the snare of the devil.

[The passage deals with the qualifications of a ]{.class_3527}["bishop,"]{.class_3528}[ called an ]{.class_3527}[overseer ]{.class_3526}[in Acts 20:28 and a ]{.class_3527}[pastor ]{.class_3526}[by modern Baptists. All three titles apply to a shepherd (more exactly, an ]{.class_3527}[undershepherd]{.class_3526}[) of a flock (see 1 Pet. 5:1--4). A pastor or bishop is an ordained ]{.class_3527}["elder"]{.class_3528}[ (Phil. 1:1; Acts 14:23; 1 Tim. 5:17) whose rulership is ]{.class_3527}[spiritual ]{.class_3526}[(1 Tim. 5:17; Heb. 13:17). There are no ARCHBISHOPS in the New Testament. Such a title would be blasphemy, as it would lay claim to an honor that Jesus Christ did not claim for Himself; Jesus Christ was a ]{.class_3527}["BISHOP"]{.class_3528}[ (1 Pet. 2:25), not an "ARCHbishop." If a pope is above an archbishop, he is a double-damned proselyte (see Matt. 23:15 for the EXACT wording) who claims to be two steps "up the ladder" from the second person of the Godhead.]{.class_3527}

"[The OFFICE of a bishop" ]{.class_3528}(vs. 1). This, then, is an official position in the local church. Women never hold such positions. All of the [elders ]{.class_3530}are male, all of the [bishops ]{.class_3530}are male, all of the [apostles ]{.class_3530}are male, and all of the [deacons ]{.class_3530}are male. If a woman were a soulwinning missionary, she might have a call to "preach the gospel" and "teach the Bible," but she wouldn't be called to PASTOR a church. There are no ordained women pastors or deacons in the Bible (see below), except in the hallucinations of apostate Fundamentalists and Roman Catholics who think that the Greek word "gunaikas" (γυναικας) means "DEACONESS." (See Rom. 16:1 in the [Amplified Version ]{.class_3530}put out by the Lockman Foundation, where Phoebe is called a "deaconess," even though the word "diakonon" (διακονον) is NEUTER, [not feminine.]{.class_3530})

"[A bishop then must be blameless, the husband of one wife"]{.class_3528} (vs. 2). Then no Catholic priest qualifies to pastor a Catholic church, and no Catholic bishop can qualify for the office. A bachelor pope, talking about being a "pastor" of a "flock," is the limit.[ Paul never claimed to be a pastor a day in his life, and he was never ordained as a bishop.]{.class_3530}[ "Blameless"]{.class_3529} (vs. 2) is used as it is found in Luke 1:6 and Philippians 3:6. The word has been confined here to the context which is ["blameless"]{.class_3529} in the office of a bishop; the idea being that in fulfilling the functions of the office, no one could rightly accuse him of misconduct. Of course, a faithful man will be accused of misconduct, and the more Biblically he conducts himself, the more accusations and revilings he is going to receive, but the idea here matches 1 Peter 5:1--4. Make sure the "blame" is [without cause ]{.class_3530}(1 Peter 4:14--15).

"[The husband of one wife"]{.class_3528} (vs. 2). When the pope and his crew hit the verse, they decided that this phrase was not in any Biblical passage, so in listing the "qualifications for a bishop" (footnote, p. 309, the [New American Bible]{.class_3530}), all of them are commented on EXCEPT this one. Small wonder! No priest, bishop, or archbishop has qualified one time since A.D. 400. Literally, the Greek says "a man of one woman," but this time the Greek scholars are no longer interested in "the Greek";[ they are interested in SEX]{.class_3530}. They are particulary interested in anyone who did something [they ]{.class_3530}wouldn't do or did something they WANTED TO DO.

[The verse has many humorous sidelines. For example, a graduate from Tennessee Temple (they put out the same garbage at Bob Jones and Springfield) told me that it meant "MARRIED ONLY ONE TIME." When I called him a liar to his face and told him he believed nothing of the kind, he insisted it was a conviction with him. I told him again that he didn't believe anything of the kind, and I would prove it to him in fifteen seconds. He held to his position: "No man qualifies for the ministry, especially the pastorate, if he has married more than one wife." I then asked him if Bob Jones Sr. was knocked out of the ministry. He began to stutter. I then asked him if ]{.class_3527}[Adoniram Judson ]{.class_3526}[and ]{.class_3527}[Thomas DeWitt Talmage ]{.class_3526}[failed to qualify as "pastors." "Bbbb-b-bbut," he blubbered, "it would be alright if the first wife died." "You didn't say that," I said. "You lied to me just like a dog. You said the verse meant 'MARRIED ONLY ONE TIME,' and you didn't believe it when you said it, and you don't believe it right now: you're a liar." He]{.class_3527}[ was;]{.class_3526}[ He]{.class_3527}[ is. ]{.class_3526}[So is the professor who taught him. So is your father, if he says the same thing.]{.class_3527}

Bob Jones University is just as kooky, or more so. Bob Jones Jr. informed me years ago (1959--1960), when I was pastoring the Brent Baptist Church, that I should resign, because since my wife had deserted me, I was "SINGLE and did not qualify for the office" according to 1 Timothy 3:2. (At that time he was trying to get the property transferred to one of his graduates, Arlin Horton, who wanted the church building and grounds for an interdenominational "Campus" church. As long as I remained, the Brent Baptist Church was making its bond payments---accrued during the pastorship of a graduate from Tennessee Temple!---and we could not be driven off the property.)

[I informed the chancellor-president emeritus, chief-high "muckety-muck" that I would get married, then, and thereby "qualify" as ]{.class_3527}["the husband of one wife."]{.class_3528}[ I was then informed that if I took THAT action I would still not qualify, for then I would have two wives!]{.class_3527}

To this day, I (honest to God) cannot figure out how the chancellor of a university could think that zero plus one equals two. It must be some of the "new math" I missed in the 50's and 60's.

Well, the text means either: 1. The elder is not to be a converted Jew who had previously taken two wives (legal under the Mosaic law); 2. he is not to take a second wife after the death of the first; 3. he is not to marry again if his former wife, who left him, goes off and marries someone else; or 4. he is to be faithful to the woman he has and not step out on her. Dummelow says, "the last is probably the right exposition" (p. 998).

[There never was any "probably" to it. If the]{.class_3527}[ "one wife" ]{.class_3528}[means ONE MARRIAGE CEREMONY, the bishop would have license to "shack up" with any number of women, as long as he didn't go through a ceremony with them.]{.class_3527}

[In modern controversy (started by "Ruckman," of course!), the apostate Fundamentalists had to ransack their Bible to try to find out if the Roman Catholic teaching on the passage was right: only one marriage ceremony, and no divorce until death. In doing it, they came up with the quaint blasphemy that since an IDEAL marriage is ]{.class_3527}[saved ]{.class_3526}[(2 Cor. 6:14), with ]{.class_3527}[saved flesh joining saved flesh,]{.class_3526}[ PLUS a ceremony (John 2:1), plus leaving father and mother (I threw that in for them; they forgot THAT one), that NO ONE WAS "MARRIED" UNLESS ALL FOUR ELEMENTS WERE PRESENT.]{.class_3527}

[This was done to avoid the horrendous implication of 1 Corinthians 6:16, which matches Genesis 2:24; Matthew 19:5; and Ephesus 5:31 in putting the finger on the ESSENCE of marriage: i.e., ]{.class_3527}[flesh joining flesh.]{.class_3526}[ The adulterers (see Matt. 5:28), who wanted to avoid this, confused the issue by refusing to discuss the ESSENCE of a marriage and, instead, drummed up the elements of an ]{.class_3527}[ideal Biblical marriage.]{.class_3526}[ THUS THEY DECLARED, OPENLY, THAT EVERY SAVED MAN OR WOMAN IN AMERICA LIVING WITH AN UNSAVED PARTNER WAS NOT SCRIPTURALLY MARRIED, EVEN IF IT WAS THEIR FIRST MARRIAGE WITH A LICENSE AND CEREMONY (see 1 Cor. 7:12--13).]{.class_3527}

Such are the devious paths of those who follow the blind into the ditch.

[Jack Wood, of Houston, Texas, was told by a leading, soulwinning Fundamentalist that he could not be ordained because he had been married before he was saved and had remarried after he was saved. He was then informed that his unsaved buddy (who later got saved) could be ordained as a bishop even though he had fornicated about fifty times, committed adultery about twenty times, pimped for a Negro prostitute, and messed up a half a dozen virgins. Jack's buddy had not committed the "unpardonable sin": He had never ]{.class_3527}[obtained a marriage license]{.class_3526}[ and stood before a preacher. He "qualified!"]{.class_3527}

[Jackasses ]{.class_3526}[are found in the flock as well as in the wilderness. Sometimes the ]{.class_3527}[shepherd ]{.class_3526}[is a jackass.]{.class_3527}

[Since we have covered these matters doctrinally, in detail, in our paperback on]{.class_3527}[ Marriage, Divorce, and Remarriage,]{.class_3526}[ we will not go into them again. I have taught THREE GROUNDS for divorce with a remarriage in the context of each one (1 Cor. 7:28; Matt. 19:9; Rom. 7:3) and have taught that since 1951. I am not about to change in 1989 to suit the fancy of some silly, sex-obsessed nut who thinks that the blood of Christ cleanses only those sins which he (or she) does not commit. Every time one of these conceited little Protestant popes says, "Ruckman doesn't qualify for the ministry," the Lord dumps another ministry on me, and at present, five secretaries cannot handle the work.]{.class_3527}

[Vincent blames the varieties of interpretations of verse 2 on the fact that the writer of Timothy was ANTI-PAULINE and refused to follow Paul's convictions on marriage as found in 1 Corinthians (pp. 228--229). (Be sure the pope gets one next year!)]{.class_3527}

[Sumner Wemp assumes that if a woman deserts her husband, it is PROOF the house was not "well ruled" (]{.class_3527}[The Liberty Bible Commentary, ]{.class_3526}[p. 633). He accepts what he calls the "TRADITIONAL" view (ah yes! Sonny, don't we know who you've been hanging out with! Mark 7:7, 9, 13) that a pastor must not remarry regardless of the conditions of the divorce. If he is innocent, he still cannot get married. He is condemned to a life of perpetual virginity (forced to "burn," if he has any ]{.class_3527}[manhood]{.class_3526}[) while his more holy and pious brethren (many of whom kissed their wive's boots SO THEY WILL TOLERATE THEM!) are allowed the joys of married life. The Judgment Seat of Christ will straighten out alot of "godly folks."]{.class_3527}

[Since the text is too hot for the translators to handle, none of them translate it according to their own real convictions. "Godly" men, right?]{.class_3527}

"[Vigilant, sober, of good behaviour, given to hospitality"]{.class_3528} (vs. 2). (For an explanation, read 1 Pet. 4:9; 1 Tim. 5:10; and Rom. 12:13.) The idea is receiving people into the house to help them with food, clothing, or counsel. Our word "hospital" comes from this word and simply means to take care of someone. ["Apt to teach"]{.class_3529} (vs. 2) the TRUTH (John 17:17), not "traditions" (see above), fables, and fairy tales like "only one marriage ceremony," etc. Most pastors are "apt not to teach." Some spend so much time socializing, coffee-drinking, cake-eating, politicking, and "putting out fires," they have no time to prepare their messages or their lessons. A pastor, for example, who thinks that the woman of Romans 7:1--4 obtained a divorce before she went through a "marriage ceremony" with another man is no more ["apt to teach"]{.class_3529} than Caiaphas or Herod.

"[Not given to wine, no striker, not greedy of filthy lucre"]{.class_3528} (vs. 3). He is not to be a heavy drinker, he is not to go around beating his adversaries up, and he is not to be greedy for money (see 1 Tim. 6:5, 10, and comments). This automatically disqualifies about 3,000 "once-married men" who covet land, buses, property, offerings, bank accounts, loans, interest, and investments. We are obviously dealing with IDEAL qualifications for an IDEAL pastor. If there is a pastor in America who meets all of the qualifications in 1 Timothy 3:1--7, I have perhaps met him on only about three occasions: [three out of about 800.]{.class_3530}

"[Patient, not a brawler, not COVETOUS"]{.class_3528} (vs. 3). See above. If a man is to be content with ["food and raiment"]{.class_3529} (1 Tim. 6:8) and be content in any ["state"]{.class_3529} (see Phil. 4:11--12), most of the "once-married pastors" in America are in sin up to their ears. (Do you see how it goes? You figure all sins are covered and forgiven except the one the other brother commits that [YOU ]{.class_3530}didn't commit. Jazzy, ain't it?)

"[One that ruleth WELL his own house"]{.class_3528} (vs. 4). If your wife were to go to a lawyer and sue for divorce, she should have NO Biblical grounds on which to get it. Is that clear? If she has Biblical grounds, your house has not been "well ruled." Now! What do you do when a servant of a ruler rises in rebellion to overthrow the ruler when he is a good ruler? How about Absalom versus David? How about Ishmael versus Gedaliah (Jer. 41)? What do you do when you are "ruling" Scripturally and correctly, and your "subjects" decide [they ]{.class_3530}want to live [anti-biblically]{.class_3530} and [wrongly]{.class_3530}?

The "one-ceremony-only" advocates have no answers; they do not even discuss such issues. This explains perhaps why many of them have their own homes torn up sooner or later, or at least suffer the humiliation of a divorce among their Christian children who were raised in a "well-ruled" home and were brought up in "Christian" day schools and high schools all the days of their lives. Better be humble or you will stumble.

"[Having his children in subjection with all gravity" ]{.class_3528}(vs. 4). Children are "children" in America until they are [18; ]{.class_3530}in the Bible, this age was [20 ]{.class_3530}(see Num. 1 and 2). A man's "house" in America, then, consists of the people that live under his roof that are younger than 18 years old. After 18, according to the laws of the United States (Rom. 13:1--5), they are "on their own" and are responsible for their actions and choices. A woman who has deserted you is not "your house," and you have no "rule" over her at all, so don't worry about it.

[One of these superpious idiots said to me one time, "You should get out of the ministry. If my wife deserted me, I would resign my church tomorrow!" ]{.class_3527}[She did. He didn't.]{.class_3526}[ (Liars are a dime a dozen these days.) I told one man in the slough of despondency over a "Dear John" note that God had called HIM to preach, not HER, and he couldn't quit just because she did. That advice came to me via John Rawlings back in 1959, and I paid attention to it. I'm glad I did.]{.class_3527}

[Down in Key West, a dear brother had his wife tell him, "IT'S ME OR GOD." ]{.class_3527}[He chose God.]{.class_3526}[ She then informed him that several of his children (over fifteen years old) were not his: she had them by a first cousin. Imagine some silly ass at Tennessee Temple, Bob Jones, Liberty University, Dallas, Denver, Pacific Coast, or Moody telling that soul-winning, Bible-believing pastor, "YOU ARE CONDEMNED TO THE LIFE OF A PERPETUAL EUNUCH." Go stick your nose in blood pudding. Anyone that stupid has no business studying for the ministry, let alone ]{.class_3527}[entering ]{.class_3526}[it.]{.class_3527}

"[(For if a man know not how to RULE"]{.class_3528} (vs. 5). See remarks under verse 4.

"[The church of God"]{.class_3528} (vs. 5). This is the Pauline nomenclature for the Body of Christ (see 3:15) as found in Galatians 1:13 (this last reference should be noted, as it is proof that the body of Christ was present before Paul's conversion). This is important to remember when dealing with "Bereans" (Cornelius Stam and Co.) who make a living off apostate Baptists who don't study their Bibles. ["The church of God"]{.class_3529} is the Body of Christ in 1 Corinthians 10:32 and Galatians 1:13, since it is present before and after Paul's conversion.

[Since a Catholic priest has no]{.class_3527}[ "house"]{.class_3528}[ to ]{.class_3527}["rule,"]{.class_3528}[ he cannot take care of anything in the Body of Christ. He is a blank; little more than an international socialist who believes in doing good deeds so as to counterfeit the Christian life.]{.class_3527}

Sumner Wemp says, "HIS SONS IN THE FAITH WILL TURN OUT LIKE THE SONS IN HIS FAMILY."

Not in David's case. Not in Samuel's case. Not in Eli's case. Not in Jack Hyles' case. Not in Charles Fuller's case. Not in Billy Sunday's case. Not in J. Frank Norris' case. Not in Peter Ruckman's case, or ANYONE ELSE'S.

[There are rotten sons in good families and good sons in rotten families, and there are plenty of bad preacher's kids in churches that are "on fire" for God and plenty of godly preacher's kids in churches where the church is so dead it would make a hammer look like a caterpillar. Sumner Wemp (Liberty University) is ]{.class_3527}[sermonizing;]{.class_3526}[ he is speaking from LACK of experience.]{.class_3527}

"[Not a novice"]{.class_3528} (vs. 6). Nowhere has this been more evident than in the history of the great Roman Whore on the seven hills, where the "shepherd" is so puffed up and bloated with his own religious egomania that he allows people to address him as the first member of the Trinity (["Holy Father,"]{.class_3529} John 17:11) and to bow at his feet while he sits on a throne. All popes are monumental novices whose lack of spiritual discernment, lack of Biblical knowledge, lack of spiritual understanding, lack of experience in soulwinning, and lack of moral courage can only be matched by their super-egos, treacherous political alliances, double-talking speeches, and betrayals of their own "Canon Laws." [No pope could pastor a Bible-believing church six months.]{.class_3530} He would look like a sixth-grade Brownie trying to instuct a platoon of Green Berets.

[One of the funniest phenomena in the twentieth century is the raft of five-point "TULIP" Calvinists who profess to have gotten saved late in life, after ten years (sometimes five, sometimes twenty) in the ministry, ]{.class_3527}[and who go right on in the ministry.]{.class_3526}[ Why, if they had just gotten saved (and they all claim it), they are ]{.class_3527}["newborn BABES"]{.class_3528}[ (1 Pet. 2:2), feeding on milk (1 Cor. 3:1--2), AND HAVE NO BUSINESS IN THE MINISTRY. But on they go, after confessing to having been WRONG the entire time they were in. (It's a wild age, ain't it, man?)]{.class_3527}

"[A good report of them which are without"]{.class_3528} (vs. 7). The reference is to 1 Corinthians 5:12--13 and 2 Corinthians 4:2 and 7:2. The idea is that the pastor must see to it that the unsaved people around him cannot JUSTLY put out a bad report on him. Of course, they will lie about him and slander him, but that is perfectly acceptable (1 Pet. 2:19--22). However, they should not be able to say, "He doesn't pay his bills," "The church doesn't pay it's bills," "He is running around with Mrs. so and so," "He didn't whip his kids for breaking our window," "He lets his wife run the church," etc. Two things are warned about in regards to verses 6 and 7: ["the ]{.class_3529}[condemnation ]{.class_3581}[of the devil"]{.class_3529} and ["the ]{.class_3529}[snare ]{.class_3581}[of the devil."]{.class_3529} Newport J. D. White ([The Expositor's Greek Testament, ]{.class_3530}pp. 114--115) has the most remarkable exposition on the "original Greek" on the two items. He pretends neither expression was present in any Greek text. The DEVIL is not discussed in two full pages of exposition of the "original Greek." Kinfolk, or something?

[1. ]{.class_3527}["The condemnation of the devil"]{.class_3528}[ is stated in Isaiah 14:10--17. It is fulfilled in Revelation 20:2 and Revelation 20:10. He was condemned for pride, the root sin being JEALOUSY (Isa. 14:10--17). This is the offer he gave Eve (Gen. 3), and she "bit" at it (Gen. 3:5). The Roman Catholic priests do not hesitate to CLAIM this high position and demonstrate, again, that they are novices of no equal on this earth. Asking a priest to intercede for you is the equivalent of drafting Mickey Rooney to play on your basketball team. Priests claim to be "GODS" (see any official Roman Catholic publication bearing the imprimatur of the bishop and censor---]{.class_3527}[nihil obstat]{.class_3526}[). Nothing could be more ridiculous, and it shows again that the fallen Adamic nature in man is susceptible to believing anything on earth, however incredible, if it will contribute to a self-righteous religion of works.]{.class_3527}

[2. ]{.class_3527}["The snare of the devil"]{.class_3528}[ is the bird catcher's net (see Prov. 7:23; Job 18:10; and Eccl. 9:12) or a large rope snare which is used to this day in Africa for catching lions (see Ezek. 12:13, 17:20; and Jer. 50:24). The Jews were "snared" by their unbelief, according to Paul in Romans 11:9, citing David.]{.class_3527}

Locally and practically, the idea is that if the local pastor does not pay his bills and maintain his testimony with the heathen officials around him, the devil will get permission (see Job 1 and 2) to trap him in a mess where he will have to compromise or quit. This may vary from "set-ups" that involve a woman to "stakeouts" that wait to catch him at the wrong place at the wrong time.

[Again, the greatest illustration is the Roman Catholic hierarchy which was founded on the writings of Cyprian (not Peter), Augustine (not Paul), and "early Christians" ]{.class_3527}[who are found nowhere in the book of Acts.]{.class_3526}[ The Catholic leaders had such a rotten testimony with the unsaved that they had to hire kings and armies to protect their "pastorate." Eventually, they became so completely ensnared in European politics that they became nothing but religious dictators ]{.class_3527}[competing ]{.class_3526}[with kings and emperors (see any Church History of the Dark Ages).]{.class_3527}

[At this present time, the Catholic hierarchy has such a rotten testimony in Europe, Africa, and America that 500,000,000 people formerly under it have become ]{.class_3527}[Communists ]{.class_3526}[as a reaction against it. No wonder it is now solidly communistic.]{.class_3527}

3:8 Likewise must the deacons be grave, not doubletongued, not given to much wine, not greedy of filthy lucre;

9 Holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience.

10 And let these also first be proved; then let them use the office of a deacon, being found blameless.

11 Even so must their wives be grave, not slanderers, sober, faithful in all things.

12 Let the deacons be the husbands of one wife, ruling their children and their own houses well.

13 For they that have used the office of a deacon well purchase to themselves a good degree, and great boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus.

[We now take up the qualifications for deacons, and one cannot help but notice how similar these qualifications are to those for the pastorate. "Down South," this is interpreted to mean that the Board of Deacons should control the church and the pastor, but let the pastor take the beating due for mistakes and bad decisions]{.class_3527}[ that were made by the Board of Deacons.]{.class_3526}

The Southern Baptist concept of a "deacon" is a RICH babe in Christ who has just been converted by joining the Sunday School and should be installed under the Associational Missionary as a subversive "plant" in the church to keep the pastor in line with the Convention's financial programs and goals. The most carnal Christians in America can be found on the deacon boards of the large Southern Baptist Churches in Nashville, Louisville, New Orleans, Birmingham, Little Rock, Atlanta, Memphis, Mobile, Charlotte, Columbia, St. Louis, Baton Rouge, and Tupelo. But in the Bible, the deacon is a minister (Greek: διακονος, diakonos---"a runner through the dust") and his qualifications are neither social nor financial; they are spiritual.

"[LIKEWISE"]{.class_3528} (vs. 8). That is, like [the bishops]{.class_3530}. Observe that six of the nine qualifications match the ["bishop"]{.class_3529} exactly. ["Not doubletongued"]{.class_3529} (vs. 8) is a new injection and has to do with the peculiar position that a deacon will occupy as a representative of the congregation---they are chosen by majority vote of the congregation in Acts 6:3--5---and also a representative of the pastor. Observe that the deacon's wife is subject to this peculiar relationship, and hence, she is warned about "SLANDER" (vs. 11), where nothing was said about it in regards to the bishop or his wife. "Playing both ends against the middle" is S.O.P. for Southern Baptist deacons in the South, and if you want to see "all hell break loose," just attend a "business meeting" in a country Southern Baptist Church after the deacons have finished their double-tongued work of turning the congregation against the pastor and vice-versa. (We speak from experience, not just "hearsay.")

"[Holding the mystery of the faith in a pure conscience"]{.class_3528} (vs. 9) hearkens back to 1:5. ["The mystery of the faith"]{.class_3529} is the subject matter it contains. What composes real faith is made up of seven MYSTERIES which are all listed in the New Testament (1 Cor. 15:51--52; Rom. 11:25; Rev. 17:5; Col. 1:26--27; Eph. 5:21--32; 1 Tim. 3:16; and 2 Thess. 2:7).

The pastor is to be a "steward" of these mysteries (1 Cor. 4:1--2) and pass them on to others (2 Tim. 2:2).

Verse 10 helps explain verse 2, on which we have already commented. You try the "deacon" out before you ordain him to the office. You see if he is a "runner through the dust" or a purse string-grabbing political opportunist.

"[Even so must their WIVES"]{.class_3528} (vs. 11). At this point, most of the Greek scholars throw away their lexicons and pretend that the verse says, "Even so the DEACONESSES\...." This hasty and ridiculous departure from plain Greek and plain English is papal-oriented. Speaking for the entire raft of apostate linguists, [The Expositor's Greek Testament]{.class_3530} says (p. 115): "These are the [deaconesses ]{.class_3530}of whom Phoebe is an undoubted example. In confirmation of this view it should be noted that ωσαυτως, hosautos, is used in introducing a second or third member of a series" (p. 116).

[Went to "the Greek" again, didn't you? But this time you went to ωσαυτως to prove that the Greek word for ]{.class_3527}["WIVES"]{.class_3528}[ (γυναικας) meant]{.class_3527}[ "deaconesses."]{.class_3526}

It doesn't mean "deaconess" in Matthew 1:20, 14:3, 19:9, 22:24, or 27:19.

It doesn't mean "deaconess" in Mark 6:17, 10:2, 12:20, or 12:23.

It doesn't mean "deaconess" in Luke 1:5, 2:5, 8:3, 14:20, 18:29, or 20:28.

It doesn't mean "deaconess" in Acts 5:1, 18:2, 21:5, or 24:24.

It doesn't mean "deaconess" in 1 Corinthains 7:2--4, 7:10--12, or 7:14, 16, 27, 29, 33, 34, or 39.

And it doesn't mean "deaconess" in ANYTHING Paul wrote (Eph. 5:22--25, 28, 31, 33, and Col. 3:18--19).

"[Uniform translation," was it, kiddies? "Consistent translating," was it, you silly hypocrites? ]{.class_3527}["EASTER"]{.class_3529} had to be translated as ["passover"]{.class_3530} (Acts 4:12), did it, you desperate fakirs? The [AV ]{.class_3530}didn't translate "uniformly," was it?

[Why, if a deacon's wife is a ]{.class_3527}[deaconess]{.class_3526}[, the pastor's wife is a ]{.class_3527}["PASTORESS."]{.class_3526}[ What fathead couldn't figure that out?]{.class_3527}

[Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown say that the word for wives is "i.e., deaconesses." "Here it may refer to women workers or DEACONESSES" (]{.class_3527}[New Bible Commentary,]{.class_3526}[ p. 1172). "[For they that have used the OFFICE of a deacon WELL purchase to themselves a good DEGREE"]{.class_3528} (vs. 13). Although ["men of high degree are a lie" ]{.class_3529}(Psa. 62:9), and ["men of low degree vanity" ]{.class_3529}(Psa. 62:9), the term here is used in the sense of 1 Chronicles 17:17. When James speaks of ["low degree"]{.class_3529} (James 1:9), he is speaking of a poor man. Here, it means that the deacon has done well because this is a ["good degree," ]{.class_3529}and it has to do with spiritual things. It is purchased (as Doctor's degrees can be purchased today for the price of a steak dinner), but it is purchased [properly:]{.class_3530} by exercising[ "boldness in the faith which is in Christ Jesus"]{.class_3529} (vs. 13). Vincent (who didn't accept one word of 1 Timothy as coming from Paul) says that it was "possibly a promotion from the deaconate to the episcopate" (p. 237), which is about as accurate as saying "possibly a promotion from the nunnery to the mummery." Alford, DeWette, Ellicott, Pfeiderer, and others refer it to the White Throne Judgment ([The Expositor's Greek Testament,]{.class_3530} p. 116): "a high grade in the future life."

[The ]{.class_3527}["good degree"]{.class_3528}[ is a high standing in the sight of the congregation, but this high standing is a SPIRITUAL high standing (as in the case of the elder who rules ]{.class_3527}["well"]{.class_3528}[: see 5:17). It is gained only by HUMILITY (Prov. 18:12) and SERVICE (Matt. 20:25--28), for God doesn't give anyone any "high standings" apart from these two essential qualities.]{.class_3527}

3:14 These things write I unto thee, hoping to come unto thee shortly:

15 But if I tarry long, that thou mayest know how thou oughtest to behave thyself in the house of God, which is the church of the living God, the pillar and ground of the truth.

16 And without controversy great is the mystery of godliness: God was manifest in the flesh, justified in the Spirit, seen of angels, preached unto the Gentiles, believed on in the world, received up into glory.

If you start calling [church buildings]{.class_3530} "houses of God," you will dig your own grave when you get to the Kingdom Halls, Seventh-day Adventist buildings, Catholic parishes, Campbellite bathtubs, five-point Calvinist mortuaries, Mormon "tabernacles," and Episcopal hell-holes. [In the great, corrupt, uncial manuscripts of the fourth and fifth centuries (]{.class_3527}[א]{.class_3570}[, A, B, C, and D), one will find a system of abbreviations used for certain words. For example, the abbreviation for ]{.class_3527}[Christ ]{.class_3526}[was ΧΣ (Chi-Sigma); the abbreviation for ]{.class_3527}[Lord ]{.class_3526}[was ΚΣ (Kappa-Sigma); the abbreviation for ]{.class_3527}[Son ]{.class_3526}[was ΥΣ (Upsilon-Sigma); the abbreviation for ]{.class_3527}[Father ]{.class_3526}[was ΠΕΡ (Pi-Eta-Rho), and so forth.]{.class_3527}

[The abbreviation for ]{.class_3527}[God ]{.class_3526}[was ΘΣ (Theta-Sigma). A block capital "Theta" is simply a large ]{.class_3527}[oval ]{.class_3526}[with a horizontal]{.class_3527}[ cross bar]{.class_3526}[ in the middle of it (Θ). If this crossbar were missing, you would have OMICRON-SIGMA (ΟΣ), which, as anyone who has studied Greek knows, is a relative pronoun meaning ]{.class_3527}["who"]{.class_3526}[ or]{.class_3527}[ "which."]{.class_3526}[ It is the masculine singular---not the NEUTER. This point is important here because those who desire to divest Christ of His deity ("militant fundamentalists" foremost: ]{.class_3527}[ASV, NASV, NIV,]{.class_3526}[ etc.) would like to make the relative pronoun refer to ]{.class_3527}["the mystery,"]{.class_3528}[ which is ]{.class_3527}[NEUTER ]{.class_3526}[(Gk.: ]{.class_3527}[to musterion]{.class_3526}[). So here we have a case where the ]{.class_3527}[AV ]{.class_3526}[translators of 1611 decided that the word was ΘΕΟΣ (Theos, which would be abbreviated as ΘΣ), WHILE EVERY SINGLE TWENTIETH-CENTURY TRANSLATION RECOMMENDED AS "RELIABLE" BY THE FACULTY MEMBERS OF "BIBLE-BELIEVING" SCHOOLS decided it was ΟΣ: "HE WHO."]{.class_3527}

[This produced what came to be known as the most unscholarly boo-boo that ever corrupted an already corrupt translation, the ]{.class_3527}[ASV ]{.class_3526}[of 1901; for, lo and behold, when the word was translated as "HE WHO" (]{.class_3527}[ASV ]{.class_3526}[of 1901),]{.class_3527}[ it formed an English sentence with a subject but no predicate.]{.class_3526}[ Thus, the "good, godly, reliable men that believed in the plenary, verbally inspired autographs" showed they were not able to write ]{.class_3527}[in their OWN language,]{.class_3526}[ but they COULD translate from ]{.class_3527}[Greek!]{.class_3526}[ Could anything be more preposterous?]{.class_3527}

[Of course. When the apostates at Bob Jones University were pushing the ]{.class_3527}[NASV ]{.class_3526}[with every power at their disposal (1960--1980), they were pushing a book that had ARTIFICIALLY CREATED A PREDICATE to make the old ]{.class_3527}[ASV ]{.class_3526}[(1901) "make sense." Out came the ]{.class_3527}[NASV ]{.class_3526}[with this: "He who was revealed in the spirit WAS vindicated\...." This "recovered the leper." ]{.class_3527}[By inserting a verb]{.class_3526}[ (not in italics!), ]{.class_3527}[the NASV constructed a false sentence to cover up a lie that had been too apparent to remain concealed.]{.class_3526}[ THIS IS THE MORAL CHARACTER AND ETHICAL standard of men who profess to be engaged in giving you a "plainer" and "clearer" translation. They must have the moral standards of an alley cat.]{.class_3527}

[One Mafia member puts in ]{.class_3527}["he who,"]{.class_3526}[ one puts in ]{.class_3527}["which is,"]{.class_3526}[ one puts in ]{.class_3527}["Christ"]{.class_3526}[ for]{.class_3527}[ "God,"]{.class_3528}[ and the other adds a verb to justify a bunch of nuts who couldn't write an English sentence. (These are the men you are to follow instead of a heretic like "Ruckman." You are immoral if you do. You're welcome; have a nice day!)]{.class_3527}

Let us cut down to the bone, OK? Instead of playing "ring-around-the-rosey" with these pious frauds, let's see what the real problem is. Let us give you the information that you cannot get AT ONE RECOGNIZED COLLEGE, SEMINARY, UNIVERSITY, OR BIBLE INSTITUTE IN AMERICA.

[1. ]{.class_3527}[Ignatius ]{.class_3526}[(A.D. 50--115) says "GOD" for the verse three times.]{.class_3527}

[2. ]{.class_3527}[Hippolytus ]{.class_3526}[(A.D. 170--236) says "GOD" for the verse twice.]{.class_3527}

[3. Of ]{.class_3527}[thirty-two lectionaries]{.class_3526}[ available, which have 1 Timothy 3:16 in them, twenty-seven read AS THE ]{.class_3527}[AV ]{.class_3526}[of 1611 (]{.class_3527}["GOD"]{.class_3528}[).]{.class_3527}

[4. Two hundred and fifty-two Greek manuscripts say ]{.class_3527}["GOD" ]{.class_3528}[with the ]{.class_3527}[AV]{.class_3526}[, and these are out of 254 copies of 1 Timothy 3:16. These copies came from three continents through a period of 1,200 years. The word "GOD" (ΘΕΟΣ, abbreviated in uncial manuscripts as ΘΣ) appears in 289 manuscripts against six that read ΟΣ, in three ancient versions against one that says ΟΣ, and in twenty church fathers against NONE that say ΟΣ. If you believe ]{.class_3527}[THAT ]{.class_3526}[because uncials A, F, G, and ]{.class_3527}[א]{.class_3570}[ ]{.class_3544}[read "ΟΣ" (D, the Vulgate, and the Latin Fathers say it is not even "ΟΣ," but "Ο"), and is also found in the Coptic, Gothic, and Sahidic translations than you will throw out the massive evidence for the reading.]{.class_3527}

[But the Satanic madness of these egomaniacs (Conservatives and Fundamentalists foremost: ]{.class_3527}[ASV, NIV, NASV]{.class_3526}[) is so great that they have to be dedicated to destroying the sense of the verse, for after all, it is THE greatest verse in the Bible on Christ's Deity; it said that]{.class_3527}[ "GOD"]{.class_3528}[ (not "CHRIST") ]{.class_3527}["was manifest in the flesh."]{.class_3528}

[Well, here is what happened. Up showed old Codex A (]{.class_3527}[Alexandrinus]{.class_3526}[)---which is classified by all apostates as an Alexandrian helpmeet for ]{.class_3527}[א]{.class_3570}[ ]{.class_3544}[(]{.class_3527}[Sinaiticus]{.class_3526}[) and B (]{.class_3527}[Vaticanus]{.class_3526}[). When it arrived in England, ]{.class_3527}[Patrick Young ]{.class_3526}[(1628--1652) saw THETA-Sigma (ΘΣ) in 1 Timothy 3:16 (i.e., ]{.class_3527}["GOD"]{.class_3528}[). He was the first custodian and collater of "A," and in letters to Hammond and Ussher he mentions this reading. ]{.class_3527}[Huish ]{.class_3526}[saw it (ΘΣ) when he sent a collation to ]{.class_3527}[Brian Walton ]{.class_3526}[(1657). ]{.class_3527}[Bishop Pearson ]{.class_3526}[(1659) said that the reading "ΟΣ"]{.class_3527}[ was found in no copy,]{.class_3526}[ and ]{.class_3527}[Fell ]{.class_3526}[(1657) and ]{.class_3527}[Mill ]{.class_3526}[(1707) saw remains of the center crossbar in the "theta" (ΘΣ, Theta-Sigma) as late as 1707. ]{.class_3527}[Mr. John Creyk]{.class_3526}[ of St. John's College saw it this way, as did ]{.class_3527}[Bentley ]{.class_3526}[(1716), and ]{.class_3527}[Wettstein ]{.class_3526}[claimed to have seen the original crossbar, though "retouched" in 1716. ]{.class_3527}[Berriman ]{.class_3526}[(1737), ]{.class_3527}[Bengel ]{.class_3526}[(1723), and ]{.class_3527}[Woide ]{.class_3526}[(1765) said it was no longer visible in 1785. ]{.class_3527}[Thus in 1785, the word looked like ]{.class_3526}[ΟΣ]{.class_3527}[ (i.e., "he who").]{.class_3526}

[Problem: WHY WASN'T EVERY MINISTERIAL STUDENT IN EVERY CHRISTIAN SCHOOL IN THE WORLD GIVEN THESE FACTS WHEN THE ]{.class_3527}[ASV ]{.class_3526}[AND THE ]{.class_3527}[NASV ]{.class_3526}[AND THE ]{.class_3527}[NIV ]{.class_3526}[CAME OUT? Easy: it would have hurt ]{.class_3527}[booksales]{.class_3526}[, and it would have hurt the scholarly image of the faculty members who had been correcting the ]{.class_3527}[AV ]{.class_3526}[for eighty-five years.]{.class_3527}

[You are dealing with ]{.class_3527}[professional liars ]{.class_3526}[whose motive is image and sales.]{.class_3527}

Their profession of faith is as phoney as a three dollar bill.

But why stop with an incision? Let's gouge awhile.

[Manuscripts F and G (that supposedly had ΟΣ) had a very peculiar ΟΣ, for there was a bar line ABOVE THE OMICRON. ]{.class_3527}[A bar line above the letter meant that the word had originally been LONGER and had been abbreviated.]{.class_3526}[ Then the original word was not "ΟΣ" ("he who"), not even in TWO manuscripts cited to prove it should read that way. "ΟΣ" is an abbreviation for nothing, but "ΟΣ" with a BAR over the omicron shows that original word was LONGER than just "ΟΣ." Tischendorf (1815--1874) actually saw the Theta (]{.class_3527}[not omicron]{.class_3526}[) in manuscript C, and so did Weber, who was a contemporary of Wettstein. They ]{.class_3527}[later ]{.class_3526}[claimed that "excessive applications of chemicals had rendered it undecipherable."]{.class_3527}

Who did this and why?

One "good, godly, dedicated, verbally inspired liar" said that the crossbar in the Theta was actually from a letter on the back of the page (Epsilon) that had "bled through," and was mistaken for a crossbar. But upon examination it was found that the block capital Epsilon on the back page was in the wrong position, and it cut the oval too high; the "bleed through" didn't cut the circle right for anyone to mistake identification.

[You see, the real problem had nothing to do with fading ink, "bleed throughs," abbreviations, or relative pronouns. The real problem the Laodicean Christian must face is why all of these translations (]{.class_3527}[NIV, ASV,]{.class_3526}[ and ]{.class_3527}[NASV]{.class_3526}[) were recommended as being "reliable" ]{.class_3527}[when this kind of DEVILMENT was behind the eradication of the greatest, foremost fundamental truth of the fundamentals.]{.class_3526}[ Why weren't the ministerial students at Bob Jones and Liberty University given this information? Instead, they were left to believe that their "peers" were honest men who could be trusted with transcription of manuscript material and textual problems. They were given bait by ]{.class_3527}[professional liars]{.class_3526}[, and they took it hook, line, and sinker, and were FRIED for a meal. ]{.class_3527}[They then paid the bill.]{.class_3526}

[In view of the documented evidence, provable in a court of law with eyewitnesses, there was no more need to kick God Almighty out of His incarnation (]{.class_3527}["GOD was manifest in the flesh"]{.class_3528}[!) than there was to promote a cheap piece of religious trash not worth the time it would take to break in the binding (]{.class_3527}[ASV, NASV, NIV,]{.class_3526}[ etc.).]{.class_3527}

"[GOD WAS MANIFEST IN THE FLESH"]{.class_3528} (vs. 16).

[That is the Holy Bible from ]{.class_3527}["the pillar and ground of the truth."]{.class_3528}[ "HE WHO, WHO, WHAT WHICH, THAT WHICH, CHRIST, THE MESSIAH, THE SACRAMENT, THE MYSTERY, was manifest\..." is the Satanic work of ]{.class_3527}[professional liars ]{.class_3526}[who are out to get your pocketbook and your attention.]{.class_3527}

No apologies to anyone, living or dead. Not even Stewart Custer (BJU) who accepted the perversion as "infallible."

Do your apologizing before God Almighty when you hit Him head-on at the Judgment.

"[Great is the mystery of godliness"]{.class_3528} (vs. 16). Like ["the mystery of the faith"]{.class_3529} (see 3:9), ["the mystery of godliness"]{.class_3529} has a number of elements. Since the ["mystery of faith"]{.class_3529} has seven mysteries, ["the mystery of godliness"]{.class_3529} has seven things to be said about it.

[1. It is ]{.class_3527}["without controversy"]{.class_3528}[ (except with the Fundamental "Cosa Nostra" and pious "Mafia").]{.class_3527}

[2. ]{.class_3527}["God was manifest in the flesh"]{.class_3528}[ with HIS own BLOOD (see Acts 20:28 and comments).]{.class_3527}

[3. He was ]{.class_3527}["justified in the Spirit,"]{.class_3528}[ because His works proved that His Spirit was the ]{.class_3527}[Holy Spirit]{.class_3526}[, and His resurrection from the dead by that Spirit (after descending into Sheol and Hell by that Spirit; see 1 Pet. 3:19--20) proved He was not "Christ" manifest in the flesh (see the ]{.class_3527}[Living Bible]{.class_3526}[ by Kenneth Taylor), but ]{.class_3527}["GOD MANIFEST IN THE FLESH"]{.class_3528}[ (see Rom. 1:3).]{.class_3527}

[4. ]{.class_3527}["Seen of angels,"]{.class_3528}[ going down and coming up (Eph. 4:6--10), at birth (Luke 2), at His temptation (Mark 1:13), and at His death (Col. 2:15).]{.class_3527}

[5. ]{.class_3527}["Preached unto the Gentiles"]{.class_3528}[ (Acts 8--28).]{.class_3527}

[6. ]{.class_3527}["Believed on in the world"]{.class_3528}[ (Rom. 10).]{.class_3527}

[7. ]{.class_3527}["Received up into glory"]{.class_3528}[ (Acts 1; Luke 24:50--51).]{.class_3527}

[In one parting shot, giving "honor to whom honor is due," Sumner Wemp of Liberty University (Lynchburg, Virginia) knocks the word ]{.class_3527}["GOD"]{.class_3528}[ out of his comments on 1 Timothy 3:16 and prints only ]{.class_3527}["WAS MANIFEST IN THE FLESH"]{.class_3528}[ in bold letters. ]{.class_3527}[Having done this, he supplies us with the missing word. ]{.class_3526}[It is not ]{.class_3527}["GOD."]{.class_3528}[ It is "CHRIST," exactly as Kenneth Taylor's Dead Bible (]{.class_3527}[Living Bible]{.class_3526}[) printed the word.]{.class_3527}

[Marvel of marvels! Behold the damnable influence of "godly fundamentalists" in the twentieth century when dealing with the ]{.class_3527}[first fundamental of the faith]{.class_3526}[, and meanwhile complaining about "Ruckman creating issues to split the brethren!"]{.class_3527}

You would have to live in Vatican City to find an equal to such miserable hypocrisy.
